subtitle.en: Weather, opening hours, trains, supermarkets — the language you'll use every week.

milestone.en: Can describe the weather and a weather forecast, ask about shop and library opening hours, book a doctor's appointment, navigate a Belgian train station, and complete a supermarket shopping conversation including 'Betaalt u gepast?'.

vocabulary.note: Container words (een pak, een fles, een blik, een pot…) are the difference between sounding tourist and sounding native at the till.
Trains, trams, buses — the LP4B train dialogue uses these.

grammar.note: Deep dive — 'aankomen' is the canonical example used in LP4B. Watch the prefix go to the end.
Optional touch. 'Er is een vacature…' shows up in LP4B.

tests.note: Focused on the four train Q&A patterns — useful for the speaking exam.
